signals.headline: IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala 2026 Assembly Polls, Confirms 27 Total Seats in UDF Seat-Sharing wi
signals.raw:
IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala 2026 Assembly Polls, Confirms 27 Total Seats in UDF Seat-Sharing with Congress (95 Seats)** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][4]

IUML announced candidates on March 17, 2026, including two women for the first time, youth/new faces (e.g., PK Firoz replacing MK Muneer in Koduvalli; PK Kunhalikutty in Malappuram), and retained Thiruvambady[3][4].
